query: Find 10 parcels larger than 5000 m² in Drammen municipality, sorted by parcel area descending.

2.description: select parcels (teig) in Drammen with area > 5000 m2, compute area, sort desc and return top 10

executions.sql:
SELECT teig.teigid AS teig_teigid,
       teig.matrikkelnummertekst,
       teig.kommunenummer,
       ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
       ST_Area(teig.omrade) AS area_m2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND ST_Area(teig.omrade) > 5000
ORDER BY area_m2 DESC
LIMIT 10;

final.sql:
-- STEP 1: query [kommuner]
SELECT kommunenummer
FROM kommuner_627ee106072240e99d2b21ec4717bf01.kommune
WHERE kommunenavn ILIKE 'Drammen';

-- STEP BOUNDARY --

-- STEP 2: query [matrikkeleneiendomskartteig]
SELECT teig.teigid AS teig_teigid,
       teig.matrikkelnummertekst,
       teig.kommunenummer,
       ST_AsGeoJSON(ST_Transform(teig.omrade, 4326)) AS geom_geojson,
       ST_Area(teig.omrade) AS area_m2
FROM matrikkeleneiendomskartteig_36313fab8faa42d99cb779d86d1ca26d.teig
WHERE teig.kommunenummer = '3301'
  AND ST_Area(teig.omrade) > 5000
ORDER BY area_m2 DESC
LIMIT 10;
